# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)

> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[21:00]` **AAOS 发布踝骨关节炎治疗临床实践指南**

- `[07:58]` **🏛️监管 | Vertex 宣布美国 FDA 批准扩大 CASGEVY® 的使用范围，用于治疗 2 岁及以上镰状细胞病或输血依赖性β地中海贫血患者**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Vertex Announces US FDA Approval for Expanded Use of CASGEVY® for the Treatment of People Ages 2 Years and Older With Sickle Cell Disease or Transfusion-Dependent Beta Thalassemia* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[20:12]` **🏛️监管 | 6 月胃肠道回顾：随着 FDA 对辅助 IO 的审查、BRAF 靶向和 CAR T 细胞疗法的全球批准，结直肠癌、胃癌见证了多个“第一”**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *June’s GI Rewind: CRC, Gastric Cancer See Several “Firsts” With FDA Review of Adjuvant IO, Global Approval of BRAF-Targeted and CAR T-Cell Therapies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:48]` **BrightGene 将目光投向西方，因为减肥药即将在中国获得批准**
